blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,782 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 60°F.
Friday: dry, highs of 40°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
